tech_news.title: Xbox is closing down Hellblade creator Ninja Theory - The Verge
tech_news.description: Xbox is closing down Ninja Theory, the studio behind the Hellblade series, a source tells The Verge. Staffers were told on a call on Monday about the closure.

tech_news.title: Call Of Duty Studio Treyarch Is Losing Its Studio Head Of Nearly A Decade - Kotaku
tech_news.description: Mark Gordon had been with the studio since 2005, and served as studio head since 2016

tech_news.title: Apple explains why Siri’s major iOS 27 overhaul took so long - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: iOS 27’s new Siri AI is a huge upgrade from the old Siri, but it also took longer than expected to arrive. Here’s why, per Mike Rockwell.

tech_news.title: Steam Next Fest Is Flooded With AI Games And It Sucks - Kotaku
tech_news.description: The event has been flooded by games containing AI-generated content

tech_news.title: FBI issues urgent Kali365 security warning for Teams, Outlook, OneDrive users - NewsNation
tech_news.description: The agency warned that the hacking platform Kali365 seeks out OAuth device codes, allowing scammers to sneak past multifactor authentication.

tech_news.title: Final Fantasy Resonance Interview: The First HD-2D FF Was Conceptualized 6-7 Years Ago and Inspired by Final Fantasy V - IGN
tech_news.description: Final Fantasy Resonance's producer and director talk with IGN about how Final Fantasy V and VI inspired this new game that adapts the Brave Exvius story for a new console-style turn-based RPG.

tech_news.title: Google Chrome is closing the loopholes that let old ad blockers keep working - The Verge
tech_news.description: Google is removing code in Chrome that allowed workarounds for running older ad blockers, two years after phasing out uBlock Origin.

tech_news.title: Users cry foul after AMD stripped memory crypto from its consumer CPUs - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: AMD's stripping of TSME from consumer CPUs appears to be a deliberate, covert move.
